name: codex-quota-capsule
description: A local-first macOS weekly quota runway assistant for Codex.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/source-codex && npm run build -w packages/analytics-collector && npm run build -w apps/desktop
scripts.probe:codex: npm run build -w packages/source-codex && tsx scripts/run-codex-probe.ts
scripts.probe:codex:rate-limits: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/source-codex && tsx scripts/read-codex-rate-limits.ts
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/source-codex && vitest run
